name: vault-connections
description: Semantic search over an Obsidian vault, reviewed connection proposals written into the related property, and a wiki layer of concept entity notes.

tools.name: vault_connections
tools.description: Search vault notes by meaning, propose links between notes for per-id approval, create wiki entity notes from unresolved wikilinks, and append approved wikilinks to the related frontmatter property; runs are inspectable with status/doctor.
